---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new tool, integration, or improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
A clear description of the problem. E.g. "I'm always frustrated when..."

**Describe the solution you'd like**
What you want to happen.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've tried.

**Additional context**
Any other context (use cases, screenshots, related tools).
